scripts.test: node tests/test-parsers.mjs && node tests/test-chunked-write.mjs && node tests/test-open-in-terminal.mjs && node tests/test-project-picker.mjs

0.7.0: Project picker menu with search, replacing the static <select> dropdown
Click on a conversation now resumes the session in a terminal; Cmd/Ctrl+Click opens the detail view
Breadcrumb navigation in the detail view (clickable to filter by subpath)
Path abbreviation with ~ for $HOME in conversation list
Copy path action in the 3-dot menu
Cmd+P / Ctrl+P global shortcut to open the project picker
Project detection fix: cache invalidation on refresh, ~ and $HOME expansion in OpenCode sessions
Removed 'Open in Terminal' from the 3-dot menu (now the primary click action)
0.8.0: Auto-switch to the selected project: choosing a project in the picker (or clicking a breadcrumb in the detail view) switches Muxy to that project when a matching one exists. The next resume in terminal then skips the project switch step. The switch is silent (status bar only).
0.8.1: Auto-switch (v0.8.0) was too silent: failures (no match, list/switchTo errors) and the already-active case had no UI feedback. Now every outcome emits a status bar message (warn/err/ok) and every step logs a [ai-history] diagnostic line to the console for easy debugging in Muxy DevTools.

muxy.description: View conversation history from Claude Code and OpenCode inside Muxy.
